select.where: and id = like '%'||#{id}||'%' and problem_summary like '%'||like '%'||#{problemSummary}||'%'||'%' and problem_description like '%'||like '%'||#{problemDescription}||'%'||'%' and audit_time = like '%'||#{auditTime}||'%' and audit_involved like '%'||like '%'||#{auditInvolved}||'%'||'%' and audit_project = like '%'||#{auditProject}||'%' and audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and create_person = like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%' and create_time = like '%'||#{createTime}||'%' and update_person = like '%'||#{updatePerson}||'%' and update_time = like '%'||#{updateTime}||'%' and isdel =1

mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database
problem_summary, problem_description, audit_time, audit_involved, audit_project, audit_model_number, create_person,
create_time, update_person,
update_time, isdel,
like '%'||#{problemSummary}||'%', like '%'||#{problemDescription}||'%', like '%'||#{auditTime}||'%', like '%'||#{auditInvolved}||'%', like '%'||#{auditProject}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{updatePerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{isdel}||'%',
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database
problem_summary=like '%'||#{problemSummary}||'%', problem_description=like '%'||#{problemDescription}||'%', audit_time=like '%'||#{auditTime}||'%', audit_involved=like '%'||#{auditInvolved}||'%', audit_project=like '%'||#{auditProject}||'%', audit_model_number=like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', create_person=like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%', create_time=like '%'||#{createTime}||'%', update_person, update_time=like '%'||#{updateTime}||'%', isdel=like '%'||#{isdel}||'%'
where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database SET isdel=0 where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: select * from hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND isdel=1;
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database(id,problem_summary,problem_description,audit_time,audit_involved,audit_project,audit_model_number, create_person,create_time,update_person,update_time,isdel) values
(like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.id}||'%',like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.problemSummary}||'%', like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.problemDescription}||'%',like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.auditTime}||'%', like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.auditInvolved}||'%',like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.auditProject}||'%', like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.auditModelNumber}||'%', like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.createPerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{auditFindDataBase.updatePerson}||'%', now(),1)
